---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature for E3Studio
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex: I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case for this feature:

- **Who** would use this? [e.g., hobbyist, professional machinist, educator]
- **What** CNC machines benefit? [e.g., GRBL routers, industrial mills, lathes]
- **When** would this be used? [e.g., during toolpath creation, simulation, export]
- **Why** is this important? [e.g., saves time, improves accuracy, enables new workflows]

## Platform Compatibility

Which platforms should this feature support?

- [ ] Windows (WPF Desktop)
- [ ] Windows (Web UI)
- [ ] Linux (Web UI)
- [ ] macOS (Web UI)
- [ ] All platforms

## Mockups / Examples

If applicable, add mockups, sketches, or examples from other software.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, references, or screenshots about the feature request.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have checked the roadmap for this feature
- [ ] I have described the use case clearly
